areaForm.createAreaDescription: Here you can create a new area. Normally an area denotes a single block with one or more lines. In some cases, such as basalt, it can also denote several blocks forming a clear group.
areaForm.areaShortDescriptionPlaceholder: Information on the area, in a nutshell...
areaForm.blocweatherTooltip: To display weather information for this area on the details page, you can enter the URL for the relevant section on blocweather.com here.
areaForm.aPublicAreaWillSetParentsToPubl: Creating a non-secret area within a secret sector automatically sets the sector and the corrisponding crag to non-secret, otherwise you cannot navigate to the area. Other pre-existing areas and sectors remain secret.
areaForm.openingAClosedAreaWillSetParent: Creating a non-closed area within a closed sector automatically sets the sector and the corresponding crag to non-closed. Other pre-existing areas and sectors remain closed.
areaForm.closedReasonPlaceholder: Explain why it has been locked...
